challenges.title: Moon Base Alpha
challenges.story: Astronauts need a new safe haven on the moon!
challenges.task: Build a moon base with a communication tower and a rover garage.
challenges.twist: It must have at least one moving part!

challenges.title: Alien Starship
challenges.story: A friendly alien race wants to trade, but they need a ship to arrive in.
challenges.task: Build an asymmetrical starship with landing gear.

challenges.title: Monster Truck
challenges.story: The arena is packed and ready for the ultimate jump!
challenges.task: Build a monster truck with huge wheels and a spoiler.
challenges.twist: It must be able to roll down a ramp without breaking.

challenges.title: Dragon's Lair
challenges.story: A fearsome dragon hoards treasure in a mountain cave.
challenges.task: Build a dragon and a cave entrance.
challenges.twist: Include a hidden trap for knights.

challenges.title: Pizza Parlour
challenges.story: The citizens are hungry for the best slice in town.
challenges.task: Build a pizza restaurant with an oven and an outdoor seating area.

challenges.title: Jurassic Park
challenges.story: A baby dinosaur has escaped its enclosure!
challenges.task: Build a tall fence and a friendly dinosaur.
challenges.twist: Give the dinosaur a bowl of water and some leaves.
